creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Tod If you could change your email back to the original email so that you can (maintainer) approve the attachment, that would be great.

After changing the email back to the current value in the ports MAINTAINER line:

Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

Once the MAINTAINER change is committed, feel free to update your Bugzilla email to the new/updated address.
